prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜排名从2021年第135名持续上升至2026年第85名，近年排名提升显著，学校综合实力和知名度稳步增强；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要因招聘公告争议引发舆情；抖音热度排名第76、评价一般，无明显热度升温信号；近年无投档断档记录；植物保护A-为唯一A-及以上学科，学科实力相对有限，对整体报考吸引力贡献不大。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信等工科专业社会热度偏热至高热，与该校招生专业匹配度较高；浙江省2026年考生总数约40万人，较2025年29.1万人大幅增长约37.6%，竞争显著加剧；贵州大学位于贵州省，对浙江考生属跨省报考，地域偏好一般；该校在浙江招生计划占比较小，无显著地域优势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次高位震荡、2026年计划继续缩招、学校排名持续上升吸引更多关注、本省考生规模大幅增长等关键因素，在2025年基准54726名基础上，缩招效应与考生激增效应叠加，预计竞争略有加剧；预测最低位次约52988名，区间52488–53488名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间52488–53488名内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如52000名以内）可重点冲刺计算机类、电气工程及其自动化等热门工科专业；位次接近区间上限（如53500名左右）建议优先考虑三档专业以确保录取。贵州大学整体学科评估实力一般，报考时建议优先选择社会热度较高、就业前景较好的工科类专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking fluctuated from approximately 38744 to 55353 to 54960 to 52959 to 54726. After a significant drop in 2022, it has oscillated within the 53000–55000 range in recent three years, with a baseline of about 54726 in 2025, showing a high-level volatile pattern. The provincial enrollment plan decreased from 50 in 2021 to 49 in 2022, 47 in 2023, 48 in 2024, and 44 in 2025, showing a slight reduction trend. The 2026 plan is 41, a further decrease of 3 from 2025, and consecutive enrollment reductions have slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science main ranking has continuously risen from 135th in 2021 to 85th in 2026, with significant improvement in recent years, steadily enhancing the school's overall strength and visibility. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly due to controversy over a recruitment announcement. Douyin popularity ranks 76th with average reviews, showing no clear signs of increased popularity. There have been no recent admission gaps. Plant Protection (A-) is the only discipline rated A- or above, indicating relatively limited academic strength, contributing little to overall application appeal.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communication are socially hot to very hot, matching well with the university's enrollment majors. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Zhejiang Province is about 400,000, a significant increase of approximately 37.6% from 291,000 in 2025, sharply intensifying competition. Guizhou University is located in Guizhou Province, which is an inter-provincial application for Zhejiang examinees, with average regional preference. The university's enrollment plan in Zhejiang accounts for a small proportion, with no significant regional advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as high-level volatility in historical rankings, continued enrollment reduction in 2026, rising school rankings attracting more attention, and a substantial increase in the number of local examinees, based on the 2025 baseline of 54726, the combined effects of enrollment reduction and examinee surge are expected to slightly intensify competition. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 52988, with a range of 52488–53488.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 52488–53488, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 52000), you can prioritize popular engineering majors like Computer Science and Electrical Engineering and Automation. If your ranking is near the upper limit (e.g., around 53500), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission. Guizhou University's overall discipline evaluation is average, so it is recommended to choose engineering majors with high social popularity and good employment prospects when applying.
